tasks.label: Task Service
tasks.command: Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^\s*#' -and $_ -match '=' } | ForEach-Object { $p = $_ -split '=',2; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($p[0].Trim(), $p[1].Trim(), 'Process') }; python -m uvicorn services.task_service:task_app --port 8001 --reload

tasks.command: Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^\s*#' -and $_ -match '=' } | ForEach-Object { $p = $_ -split '=',2; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($p[0].Trim(), $p[1].Trim(), 'Process') }; python -m uvicorn services.scheduler_service:schedule_app --port 8002 --reload
